summary: Verified (1) Actions Shipped weekly report endpoint + UI widget and (2) Mobile-first read-only Client Readiness Portal. Backend: 5/5 pytest passed (days=7 returns 7 daily entries, days=30 returns 30, actor filter works, totals & delta_wow schemas correct). Frontend: portal renders all 6 sections (hero/outcomes/factors/actions/risks/activity) at 390x844 with no horizontal scroll, zero sliders/toggles/apply/generate buttons (confirmed read-only), factor weights render correctly at 30/25/20/15/10 % (3000%-bug fix confirmed), portal-book-chat CTA + portal-back both navigate correctly. ActionsShippedReport on /retirement-control-center shows 4 primary KPIs with WoW deltas (Sims 0, Strategies 1 +100%, Drafts 3 +100%, Notified 3 +100%), 3 secondary KPIs (Clients touched 1 / $778k / 25 readiness computes), sparkline toggles 7↔30 bars, refresh works. ClientHome at /client-home exposes home-open-mobile-portal link → /client-readiness (confirmed href + click navigates). Regression: RetirementControlCenter, ClientDecisionHub, IntelligenceFeed, FutureImpactEngine, ComplianceTrail all load with no webpack overlay & no console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: adviser_reports.py: ts_query() mutates nested dict (q['timestamp']['$lt'] = end) which could confuse callers if reused, but each call creates a fresh dict so current usage is safe.
ClientReadinessPortal fetches /api/compliance-audit/adviser-actions without loading state — silent empty fallback is acceptable for read-only UX but consider a skeleton for perceived polish.
ActionsShippedReport default is 7 days; when API is unavailable the widget shows KPIs with 0 + empty sparkline (no error state). Currently acceptable, minor UX polish only.
test_credentials: No auth. localStorage wealth_command_compliance_v5=permanent; app_mode=client (portal) or adviser (report).
seed_data_creation: Used existing Mongo collections from prior test runs (3 drafts approved, $778k impact, 3 notifications, 25 readiness computes).
context_for_next_testing_agent: ClientHome lives at /client-home (NOT /client-portal). The mobile portal /client-readiness reads selected_client from localStorage (falls back to thompson_family). Actions Shipped widget is mounted inside /retirement-control-center — scroll down to view. Backend endpoint /api/reports/actions-shipped takes days & optional actor query params.
